HSS loop    \u2192 triggers Controller every 10 min, which calls getFlightStatus         Composite storage key: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(flightId, flightDate))         Only flights with active insurance pools are retained. On deregisterFlight,         all storage for that flight is deleted to keep the contract lean.Deployment order:           1. Deploy OracleAggregator              \u2192 aggregatorAddress           2. deregisterFlight(string,uint256).details: Called by Controller after a FlightPool fully settles and is cleared.      Deletes all storage for the flight — keeps the contract lean.

getActiveFlights().details: Called by the off-chain polling service before each external API batch call.         Returns an empty array if no flights are currently registered.

getFlightStatus(string,uint256).details: Called every 10 minutes by the HSS loop via Controller.      Returns the simplified FlightStatus the Controller needs for settlement logic.      Reverts if the flight is not currently registered.

registerFlight(string,uint256).details: Called by Controller when a new FlightPool is deployed.      Adds the flight to the active registry so the oracle starts tracking it.

setController(address).details: Step 3 in the deployment script, after Controller is deployed.

setOracle(address).details: Step 4 in the deployment script, after oracle EOA/contract is known.

updateFlightStatus(string,uint256,uint8,.details: Called by the authorized oracle after querying the external flight API.         - scheduledArrival is only written the first time (0 = "no update")         - actualArrival is only written the first time (0 = "not yet landed")         - delayMinutes is derived on-chain when actualArrival is first provided         - cancellationReason is only stored when status == Cancelled

params.actualArrival: Unix timestamp of actual landing (0 if not yet landed)
params.cancellationReason: short reason code e.g. bytes32("WEATHER") — ignored if not Cancelled
params.flightDate: midnight UTC Unix timestamp for the operating date
params.scheduledArrival: Unix timestamp of scheduled arrival (0 if unchanged/unknown)

authorizedController().notice: The Controller contract — only address allowed to call         registerFlight / deregisterFlight / getFlightStatus

authorizedOracle().notice: The off-chain oracle pusher — only address allowed to call updateFlightStatus

deregisterFlight(string,uint256).notice: Called by Controller after a FlightPool fully settles and is cleared

getActiveFlights().notice: Returns all flights the oracle should query from the external API.         Only includes flights with an active insurance pool.

getFlightStatus(string,uint256).notice: Called every 10 minutes by the HSS loop (via Controller) to check flight status

registerFlight(string,uint256).notice: Called by Controller when a new FlightPool is deployed for a flight

setController(address).notice: Wire in the Controller contract address. Can only be called once.

setOracle(address).notice: Wire in the off-chain oracle pusher address. Can only be called once.

updateFlightStatus(string,uint256,uint8,.notice: Push updated flight data from the external API into the contract.
